name: Adyar Ananda Bhavan

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against Adyar Ananda Bhavan's current Herndon menu page and restaurant-linked Toast catalog.

The corrected catalog contains 158 distinct current products across 18 real categories: all 147 products currently published on the official site plus 11 distinct currently available Toast-only additions.

The frozen 167-row merge contained 23 category/description fragments as products and one stale Badhusha row. Duplicate and configurable presentations were consolidated, while official-site sweets and savories remain current even when the time-specific Golden Hour Toast surface marked the corresponding sellable SKU out of stock.
The Toast-only packaging row named Large was excluded, configurable flavor SKUs were consolidated into their official bases, and all beverages were placed after food, sweets, and savories.

The official menu publishes item descriptions but no complete allergen matrix, complete recipe set, or kitchen-wide cross-contact policy. Fixed positive fields therefore come only from explicit ingredient text or mandatory food formats.

Seven packaged products published on the official site also have restaurant-linked Toast package labels. Their contains statements were kept separate from facility-handling cautions; wheat, barley, soy, peanut, and tree-nut facility language is represented as may-contain rather than fixed ingredients.

Eleven Toast-only additions remain allergen-source unavailable because restaurant-linked vendor text is not promoted to restaurant-issued allergen authority. Ingredient Intelligence may still provide its separately labeled signal.

Of 143 applicable frozen rows, 57 had incorrect allergen fields: 30 underreported fixed signals, 22 overreported unsupported signals, and five incorrectly promoted facility handling to fixed contains claims.
The frozen generic website merge treated six headings and 17 descriptions as products, duplicated presentation rows, used a fake Indian category, and shifted neighboring metadata into products.

The correction parses the current official page's menu blocks and the time-specific linked Toast rendering independently, asserts raw source counts, excludes out-of-scope packaging, reconciles aliases and configurable products, and preserves the official category order with beverages last.

Allergen semantics explicitly avoid mapping coconut to tree nut, besan/rice/lentil/corn flour to wheat, or eggplant to egg; rava/semolina and mandatory croutons correctly map to wheat and gluten, and optional flavor choices do not become fixed base-product allergens.

The final-stage repair is guarded by verified item/category/source counts, artifact and stale-row exclusions, package-scope and allergen sentinels, vendor-only unavailable behavior, and beverage order.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Confirmed the Herndon restaurant identity and its current official menu link.
Captured and reviewed 147 current restaurant-issued menu products across 18 food, sweets, savories, dessert, and beverage sections.
notes: The page publishes names and descriptions but no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact guide.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Direct automated retrieval returned HTTP 403. The retained render-proxy artifact exposed 153 time-specific Golden Hour rows, including 126 available and 27 out-of-stock rows, and corroborated current products, 11 distinct additions, and seven package labels.
notes: The linked vendor catalog was used for current menu corroboration and package-label scope, not promoted to restaurant-issued authority for vendor-only item names.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Full-text review of the official site and linked ordering catalog found item descriptions and seven linked package labels but no complete restaurant-issued allergen matrix, recipe guide, or kitchen-wide cross-contact policy.

findings.summary: The frozen 167-row catalog contained 23 headings/descriptions as products, one stale Badhusha row, duplicate/configurable presentation rows, a fake Indian category, and omitted current products.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 158 distinct current products across 18 real categories, removed all 23 artifacts and stale Badhusha, consolidated aliases and configurable choices, excluded packaging, and kept beverages last.

findings.summary: Fifty-seven of 143 applicable frozen rows had incorrect allergen fields: 30 underreported, 22 overreported, and five confused facility handling with fixed contains claims.
findings.resolution: Re-derived fixed signals only from current published ingredients and mandatory formats, separated contains from may-contain handling language, and left 83 current products unavailable where authoritative item-level evidence is insufficient.

findings.summary: Frozen signals incorrectly treated coconut as tree nut, non-wheat flours as wheat/gluten, and eggplant as egg, while missing explicit rava, dairy, nut, bread, noodle, momo, samosa, and crouton signals.
findings.resolution: Applied reviewed ingredient semantics with explicit exclusions and mandatory-format assertions, including milk/wheat/gluten for Cream of Tomato Soup because its official description names butter and fried croutons.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog claimed official ingredient authority for 78 rows without a complete restaurant-issued allergen source and did not distinguish fixed package contains statements from facility handling.
findings.resolution: Limited official-ingredient status to 75 current rows with positive published support, left 83 rows unavailable, kept linked-vendor-only additions non-official, and represented package facility handling as may-contain.

repairs.summary: Prepared and targeted-tested a 158-item current Adyar catalog with 18 real categories, source-correct fixed and may-contain semantics, unavailable vendor-only signals, no frozen artifacts or stale Badhusha, and beverages last.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/adyar-repository.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 158 items, 18 categories, 75 official-ingredient rows, 83 unavailable rows, no stale Badhusha or parser artifacts, correct package/allergen sentinels, and beverages last)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 158 items, 18 categories, 75 positive published-signal rows, and 83 accurately unavailable rows.

Focused source-count, artifact exclusion, compact-catalog, optional-choice, flour, coconut, eggplant, fixed-ingredient, package-scope, linked-vendor authority, all 167 frozen-row reconciliation, category, unique-id, beverage-scope, and beverage-order checks passed.
